summary: Part 1 (auth + role-based routing) tested end-to-end. Backend: 14/14 pytest cases PASS (health, login for all 4 seed accounts, wrong-password 401, register success + duplicate 400, /auth/me with/without/invalid token, MOCKED OTP request + verify success/fail). Frontend (mobile 390x844): Welcome screen renders with brand + both role cards. Student login routes to (student) tabs (Today, Menu, Wastage, Settings). Admin login (institution 'Demo Hostel') routes to (admin) tabs (Students, Dashboard, Wastage, Info, Settings). Pending login routes to 'Waiting for approval' (pending-title). Blocked login routes to 'Account not approved' (blocked-title). Register form validates empty fields, short password, password mismatch, and duplicate mobile (shows backend error), and shows 'Registration submitted' success screen on valid submit. Sign out from settings (testID *-settings-logout) returns to Welcome. Session persists across full reload (token via @/src/utils/storage). Only minor RN web warnings observed: shadow* deprecated and props.pointerEvents deprecated (cosmetic, non-blocking).

issues: Console warns: '"shadow*" style props are deprecated. Use "boxShadow".' Coming from theme.ts shadow.card. Cosmetic for web preview only.
Console warns: 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents'. Likely from a dependency (react-native-safe-area-context / RN web). Non-blocking.
testID='welcome-title' resolves to 2 DOM nodes under Playwright strict mode (Expo Router web SSR quirk: head + body). Workaround: tests use .first. Not user-visible.

action_items: (Optional polish) Replace shadow.* props in /app/frontend/src/theme.ts with boxShadow for web parity (no functional impact on native).
(Optional polish) Audit usage of pointerEvents prop and migrate to style.pointerEvents where applicable.
Part 2: build out actual tab content for student/admin placeholder screens.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: clean, async, uses uuid IDs, excludes _id from responses, env-driven config, idempotent seeding, indexes created on startup. Good.
AuthContext.useAuthRouting uses lastTarget ref to prevent redirect loops; correctly handles approved/pending/blocked + role.
client.ts uses process.env.EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL with hard fail-warn; consistent /api prefix.
All interactive elements (role cards, login submits, inputs, register fields, logout) have testID attributes. Good test affordance.
seed_data_creation: No persistent seed data created beyond what the backend itself seeds. Registration test created one TEST_<uuid> + one test<timestamp> student in 'pending' status; these are inert pending accounts that cannot log in (login is allowed, but they would land on the pending screen).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend base URL via EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL from /app/frontend/.env. Seed accounts in /app/memory/test_credentials.md are idempotent. testID conventions: role-{student,admin}-card, student-login-title, admin-login-title, *-settings-logout, register-success-title, pending-title, blocked-title. Note: 'welcome-title' renders twice on web (SSR + CSR) -> use .first in Playwright. OTP endpoints are MOCKED (mock_otp '123456').
rca_of_issue: No issues to RCA. All Part 1 acceptance criteria met.
